name: Five Minute Quick Brunch
recipeIngredient: 1 slice Turkey ham or 3 slices Turkey bacon
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the bread in the toaster on medium setting and while it is toasting, spray the bottom and sides of a microwave-safe bowl with the non-stick spray.
2. Cut the ham or bacon into small pieces (about 1/4") and combine with the rest of the ingredients in the bowl.
3. Cook the egg mixture in the microwave for 3 minutes on high, stirring and turning the bowl every 30 seconds. (More time may be added as necessary.)
4. Cut the microscrambled eggs into 2 equal portions and place each portion on one slice of hot buttered toast. Top with a slice of cheese if desired, and serve with coffee and juice.
